impact: This gives the daemon a narrow validation target after repeated regex SyntaxError failures: blocked checkbox-178/182/186/187/191/193/194/195/197 are skipped, and a fresh unchecked daemon-repair task is selected without touching PP&D domain implementation.
summary: Add a parser-clean daemon-only unittest for checkbox-199 blocked-task selection using plain string construction and no custom regex parsing.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 7 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
